top5Opportunities.statement: Minimize machining cell stoppages from profile blank supply failures exceeding 1 per year
Minimize likelihood of geometry misspecification causing >=6 week die re-qualification
Minimize likelihood of incorrect EN 10204 3.1 cert data passing incoming review
Minimize likelihood of undetected grade substitution in blank deliveries
Minimize single-source dependency on custom profile blank geometry

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of pump OEM design engineer misspecifying custom rotor blank geometry causing >=6 week die re-qualification
needs.importanceRationale: Custom die requires precise geometry drawing; misspec triggers 6+ week die remake

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of supplier Cpk for blank OD tolerance falling below 1.33
needs.importanceRationale: Die-controlled process yields repeatable Cpk on custom cross-sections

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of surface hardness variation exceeding +-2 HRC across hardened contact zone
needs.importanceRationale: In-line induction hardening with geometry-matched coils; no incumbent pre-hardens blanks

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of EN 10204 3.1 certificates containing incorrect values causing downstream failures
Minimize likelihood of undetected steel grade substitutions in profile blank deliveries
needs.importanceRationale: Grade substitution detectable only after machined components fail testing

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of batches with cross-section deviation >+-0.05mm being released to machining
needs.importanceRationale: IT8 tolerance (+-0.02 mm) from cold drawing; bar stock requires OEM machining to achieve

needs.statement: Minimize likelihood of surface hardness varying by more than +-3 HRC within single production batch
Minimize likelihood of lot-to-lot OD drift exceeding +-0.02mm forcing datum resets
needs.importanceRationale: Monitored die wear; controlled cold-drawing parameters lot-to-lot

needs.statement: Increase ability to detect dimensional drift before it propagates to machined rotors
needs.importanceRationale: SPC monitoring per IATF 16949; CMM data per lot

needs.statement: Increase ability to receive conforming replacement stock within 5 working days of NCR issuance
needs.importanceRationale: Custom profile requires existing die + production scheduling; bar stock available in 1-3 days

needs.statement: Minimize single-source dependency on custom profile blank creating supply disruption risk beyond 4 week safety stock
needs.importanceRationale: Custom die is supplier-specific and non-transferable

needs.statement: Minimize machining cell stoppages from profile blank supply failures exceeding 1 per year
needs.importanceRationale: Single unplanned stoppage disrupts entire production schedule
